fields.name: namePrefix
fields.label: Name Prefix
fields.description: Prefix used when naming Evroc resources for the machine.

fields.name: projectID
fields.label: Project ID
fields.description: Evroc project ID where the machine will be created.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Region
fields.description: Evroc region for the machine and its supporting resources.

fields.name: zone
fields.label: Zone
fields.description: Evroc availability zone for the machine boot disk and VM placement.

fields.name: computeProfileRef
fields.label: Compute Profile
fields.description: Evroc compute profile reference for the VM size.

fields.name: diskImageRef
fields.label: Disk Image
fields.description: Evroc disk image reference for the boot disk.

fields.name: sshAuthorizedKeys
fields.label: SSH Authorized Keys
fields.description: SSH public keys injected into the node for bootstrap and maintenance.

fields.name: sshSourceCIDR
fields.label: SSH Source CIDR
fields.description: CIDR allowed to access the node over SSH.

fields.name: kubernetesAPISourceCIDR
fields.label: Kubernetes API Source CIDR
fields.description: CIDR allowed to access the Kubernetes API on the provisioned node.
